response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility across languages and systems, and demonstrated leadership in open-source and team mentoring — aligning well with the staff-level, customer-facing expectations. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and clear involvement in GenAI or multi-agent systems beyond vague mentions of 'AI-agent infrastructure' — raising concerns about domain-specific depth.
strengths: Proven staff-level engineering leadership across diverse tech stacks and teams
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring experience
Extensive cloud and infrastructure experience (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years in production-grade AI solution development
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization
AI-related work described vaguely; no mention of LangGraph, CrewAI, or MCP implementation details
